steps.expected: ROI shows 'N/A' or safe fallback - never NaN, Infinity, or crash

steps.action: Verify estimated revenue with $0 job value
steps.expected: Estimated revenue shows $0 when job value is not configured
steps.observed: Estimated Revenue from Captured Leads: $0 - correct display

steps.expected: No console errors related to ROI calculation

frictions.description: Settings page shows placeholder text 'Business profile and ROI configuration controls will appear here' instead of actual settings form. The form fields (Average Job Value, Monthly Cost) mentioned in validation contract are not yet implemented.
frictions.resolution: Not resolved - tested ROI edge cases via dashboard with default/clean localStorage state instead

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed (VAL-DASH-011). ROI edge case handling works correctly: when Butter AI Monthly Cost is $0 (default), the ROI Estimate card displays 'N/A' as a safe fallback instead of NaN, Infinity, or crashing. The card remains readable with clean layout. When average job value is $0, estimated revenue correctly shows $0.
